creator: eserte@vran.herceg.de
text:
The pkg-plist for www/w3-4 is hardcoded for FSF emacs.
	However, if xemacs is installed on the system, the configure
	script will detect this and will use xemacs' site-lisp as the
	installation target.

Fix: Maybe force the port to use the site-lisp dir of FSF emacs as
	the installation target. This can be done by changing the
	Makefile as follows:
